summary: Tested all new features: Settings tab, age-verification flow, Companion pack visibility, Customize tab lock/unlock, typing indicator, and default active pack. Backend: 20/20 tests passed. Frontend: All 18 feature checks passed.

issues: Advanced Settings label is rendered in ALL CAPS (ADVANCED SETTINGS) which may not match design intent - minor style note only

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: createChatSessionId() at index.tsx line 25 still uses 'devin-chat-' prefix for session IDs - purely internal, no UX impact but could be renamed to 'paule-chat-' for consistency
ensure_sensible_default_packs() correctly migrates users with Companion (unverified) to coder-pro or coder fallback on server startup - confirmed working in server logs
age_verified state in userSettings is correctly used as a filter guard: packs.filter(pack => !pack.age_gate || userSettings.age_verified) - verified frontend-side filtering works correctly

test_credentials.admin_state_after_testing: Task Master active, age_verified=True (set during testing), customization: witty/direct/concise

seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_settings_* and TEST_coder_* users created via pytest fixtures (session-scoped, prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin user now has: Task Master active, age_verified=True, customization=witty/direct/concise. Settings tab works, Advanced Settings expands correctly. Age-verify flow: Settings > Advanced Settings > Enable mature content > confirm modal > Companion appears in Packs. Free Coder pack shows lock in Customize tab. Paid packs show full customization form. Typing indicator correctly shows PAUL·E.
